title: astragalus antheliophorus
intro: Astragalus antheliophorus is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is also known as antheliophorus milkvetch or desert milkvetch. Astragalus antheliophorus has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to help boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Astragalus antheliophorus include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall health and well-being, and to alleviate symptoms of fatigue, anxiety, and respiratory issues.
